productName: Thunder Stix - Tilted-DOH-Glass Tip Preroll (1.2g) / Spritzer (H)
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Spritzer, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of apricot, grapefruit, and ammonia, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
